summary: Tested CEO OS module rebuild (4 pages: Users, Security, Pipeline, Reports). Fixed critical bug in CustomerDetailDialog. All features working correctly.

bugs_fixed.issue: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'modules') - localCustomer state not syncing when customer prop changes
bugs_fixed.fix: Added useEffect to sync localCustomer state when customer prop changes, and added null check for localCustomer

ceo_users_page.details: Table displays 8 customers with correct columns (company, contact, plan badge, MRR, status dot, modules count, signup date). Search filters work. Row click opens CustomerDetailDialog.

customer_detail_dialog.details: Plan dropdown works (4 plans: Spet Core $149, Spet Flow $299, Spet Sync $499, Spet OS $724). Status dropdown works (Active, Trial, Past Due, Churned). 8 module toggles with Switch components work. Toast notifications appear on changes.

ceo_security_page.details: 4 KPI cards (Risk Score 40/100, Total Alerts 7, Critical 1, Venues At Risk 3). Risk Assessment gauge chart rendered. Alert Breakdown donut chart with Critical/Warning segments. Module Usage horizontal bar chart with all 8 modules. Active Alerts section with severity styling.

ceo_pipeline_page.details: Kanban board with 6 columns (New, Qualification, Presentation, Negotiation, Evaluation, Won). 10 deals correctly distributed. Stage headers show count and total value. Deal detail dialog shows full contact info with mailto/tel links. Move to Next Stage and Mark as Lost buttons work.

ceo_reports_page.details: 3 KPI cards (Active Opportunities=8, Won Opportunities=2, Conversion Rate=20.0%). Pipeline Funnel shows all 6 stages with deal counts and values. Loss Reasons section shows 5 reasons with percentage bars. Pipeline Value Over Time area chart rendered with 6 monthly data points.

theme_toggle.details: Theme toggle changes data-theme attribute (dark <-> light). localStorage persistence via 'spetap-theme' key.

non_ceo_access.details: Non-CEO user (teste@teste.com) cannot access /ceo routes - redirected to /venue/home

seed_data_creation: None - using in-memory mock data from ceoService.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: CEO OS module rebuild complete. 4 new pages (Users, Security, Pipeline, Reports) tested and working. All data comes from ceoService.js in-memory mock store. CustomerDetailDialog bug was fixed (useEffect added to sync state). Theme toggle works with localStorage persistence.
mocked_api_note: All CEO page data from /app/frontend/src/services/ceoService.js in-memory store - NO BACKEND APIs
